action.reasoning: Observation: iter_17 best mean_r2=0.2445 with linear model+humidity override. iter_18 local val R² had nan for q due to zero-variance dims. Analysis: Using safe R² that handles zero-variance dims (set to 0) will give realistic comparison. If linear model trained on larger sample yields positive r2_q, overall mean_r2 will improve. With 26min and 12 iters left, improving linear model is fastest path. Decision: Write improve_linear.py to load 2M training samples, fit Ridge, compute safe per-dim R² on val, compare with/without humidity override, save best linear model and config. Update predict.py to use config for override decision. Submit eval.
